spokespersons.name: Wilgert Hart
spokespersons.title: Founder & Managing Partner, Start to Scale Financial Management
spokespersons.quoteStyle: Warm, steady senior-finance register; practical and people-oriented; plain Dutch over jargon; writes in Dutch and English.
spokespersons.bio: Wilgert Hart is founder and managing partner of Start to Scale Financial Management. He spent nearly three decades in senior finance, including CFO roles at Hill & Knowlton (WPP's global communications firm) and earlier finance roles at EMI Music Netherlands and Warner Music Benelux. Start to Scale Financial Management operates under Duke Strategy & Corporate Affairs B.V. (KvK 95849696).
